shapes.name: square
shapes.notes: Generator emits rectangles as TypeRotatedRectangle; injector maps rectangle/square geometry to WordSquare 0x0065.

shapes.name: circle
shapes.notes: Generator emits KindEllipse/TypeRotatedEllipse. A circle is represented by equal rx/ry. Injector writes WordCircle 0x0066.

shapes.name: ellipse
shapes.notes: Ellipse is implemented as Circle word 0x0066 with non-uniform scale. The distinct WordEllipse 0x0088 is documented as rendering like a crescent, so it is not used for normal ellipses.

shapes.name: triangle
shapes.notes: Generator emits TypeTriangle. Injector uses TriangleFit and writes WordTriangle 0x0068.

shapes.name: line
shapes.notes: TypeLine/KindLine exists for internal raster/editor geometry, but model.go and inject/layer.go state there is no in-game line primitive. Injector skips TypeLine.

shapes.name: glow
shapes.notes: KindGlow/TypeGradGlow is a native FH6 radial gradient primitive. Gaussian mode can emit glow splats. Editor palette can add glow.

shapes.name: disk
shapes.notes: KindDisk/TypeGradDisk is modeled and injectable as a feathered radial disk. Editor palette can add disk; normal generator path does not appear to emit it by default.

shapes.name: circle_border
shapes.notes: WordCircleBorder is defined as 0x0070, and maskbank manifest includes ring-sm_0070. It is available through mask/dictionary support, not normal generator output.

shapes.name: arc
shapes.notes: Maskbank manifest contains multiple arc/gentlearc entries. They are supported as registered mask words; exact word depends on the selected bank entry.

shapes.name: crescent
shapes.notes: WordEllipse 0x0088 is documented as rendering like a crescent. Maskbank also includes crescent-labeled entries such as 0x007f and 0x0084.

shapes.name: trapezoid
shapes.notes: No explicit trapezoid primitive or obvious trapezoid mask was confirmed in the inspected files. Could still exist as an unclassified mask word and needs manual registry testing.

shapes.name: glyph
shapes.notes: Maskbank registers glyph/letter words. Glyph proposer and glyph prepass exist, but normal generator defaults do not appear to emit glyphs unless glyph features are enabled and mask-capable backend support is present.

shapes.name: mask
shapes.notes: Mask words are registered through model.RegisterMaskWord from internal/maskbank. Shape.Type can be the in-game mask word with affine Data [cx, cy, Hx, Hy, rot, skew].

shapes.name: unknown
shapes.notes: Fallback for unconfirmed shape words or primitives not represented in the inspected registry.
